raw_consumer_statement:
I reported my card XXXX and XXXX transactions made on XX/XX/XXXX and XX/XX/XXXX to be fraudulent ( totaling {$610.00} ) on XX/XX/XXXX by calling the Home Depot Credit Card customer service XXXX and speaking with multiple agents regarding these facts and requesting that my current card be deactivated and these charges be disputed. The initialization of a lost/stolen card cancellation, replacement card mailing, and fraud dispute was definitely confirmed by the agents over the phone at the time. Furthermore, I messaged the same information on XX/XX/XXXX using my online accounts secure messaging. Finally, after seeing the charges still on my account after several weeks, I called on XX/XX/XXXX to confirm my dispute was ongoing and underway, and was dismayed to be told that it was never started in the first place after my call on the XXXX. 

Despite an extensive customer service call on XX/XX/XXXX in response to these fraudulent transactions, my report never resulted in action despite the assurances of the Home Depot Credit Card XXXX customer service team. A dispute was never begun, and these charges were not credited or lifted from my account as they should have. A new replacement credit card was not even sent to me until I called a second time to re-request it approximately XXXX business days later after initially reporting the lost and stolen credit card. I am deeply disappointed with the experience I have had with Home Depot Credit Card XXXX. 

Furthermore, I have been given conflicting information on multiple customer service calls, such as that their dispute / fraud investigation could take XXXX days in XXXX call, and XXXX days in another call. Furthermore, I am unable submit a dispute transaction request through the online account website of my Home Depot Credit Card ( this option is available in the settings menu but no available transactions are listed to dispute ). When I call back the Home Depot Credit Card XXXX customer service, they always say they're going to explain my situation to another agent and transfer me there, but they never explain anything to this agent and merely keep me on hold for hours at a time and I have to re-explain my situation. It is a horrible customer service experience that makes it extremely hard to protect my interests as a consumer and deal with fraudulent transactions.
